ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Build enemies up to tear them down with the Machinist Mina Pack!</>
Includes the following:
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Build enemies up to tear them down with the Machinist Mina Pack!</>
Includes the following:

SubTitleText.SourceString:
Rewards distributed after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 1" mission in "Save the World" Campaign.

V-Bucks are an in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes. In Battle Royale and Creative you can purchase new customization items like New Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, and Wraps! In Save the World, you can purchase X-Ray Llamas that contain weapon and trap schematics, plus new Heroes, and more!
SubTitleText.LocalizedString:
Rewards distributed after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 1" mission in "Save the World" Campaign.

V-Bucks are an in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale, Creative, and Save the World modes. In Battle Royale and Creative you can purchase new customization items like New Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, and Wraps! In Save the World, you can purchase X-Ray Llamas that contain weapon and trap schematics, plus new Heroes, and more!

DisclaimerText.SourceString: Note: Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: Note: Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.
